title: Infosys and ATP launch Ally AI chatbot and extend digital partnership through 2028
detailed_summary: Infosys and ATP announced the launch of Ally, an AI-powered chatbot built using Infosys Topaz to enhance tennis fan engagement with real-time information on match statistics, tournament draws, schedules, head-to-head comparisons, player stats, and historical records. Infosys and ATP also extended their partnership through 2028, continuing a relationship in which Infosys has served as ATP's Digital Innovation Partner since 2015. The document also notes that Infosys and ATP launched Version 2.0 of Carbon Tracker in 2025, with more than 300 players using the tool since 2023 and 585 tonnes of carbon offset in 2025 alone.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and ATP announced the launch of Ally, an AI-powered chatbot to enhance fan engagement and bring the tennis community closer to the sport.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028

key_facts.fact: Infosys and ATP announced an extension of their partnership through 2028.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028

key_facts.fact: Infosys has been ATP's Digital Innovation Partner since 2015 and has helped develop ATP PlayerZone, the ATP Stats Centre, and the ATP app.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028

key_facts.fact: Ally is powered by Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering using generative AI technologies.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028

key_facts.fact: Ally is integrated with the ATP Stats Centre and includes guardrails such as content filtering, personally identifiable information removal, and contextual checks to detect and prevent misinformation and hallucinations.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028

key_facts.fact: Infosys and ATP launched Version 2.0 of Carbon Tracker in 2025.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and ATP Unveil 'Ally', an AI Chatbot to Elevate Fan Experience, and Announce Extension of Partnership Through 2028
